base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of scissorman — a character from 1995 clock tower. Scissorman — giant-scissor child-killer stalker. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Scissorman — giant-scissor child-killer stalker; recurring ambusher
